name: Core Set 2021

draft.notes: Two US pack formats described: classic (common-uncommon-rare-land-ad) and a 'new' format (rare first, commons last). Both are 15-card draft boosters. Land slot holds a basic land or tap land (10 extra common lands). Showcase variants and borderless non-planeswalker cards appear in the foil slot. If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare.

statedRates: consistent with common foil rate ~1/6 and uncommon foil ~1/12
sourceNotes: Core set. Three basic land variations plus 10 extra common lands. Printed USA, Belgium, and Japan. 36 packs per box. Borderless planeswalkers also exist.
